name: memagora
description: Give your AI a memory — mine projects and conversations into a searchable palace. Automated institutional knowledge extraction for teams. 19 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, and guided setup.

interface.longDescription: Give your AI a persistent memory — mine projects and conversations into a searchable palace backed by ChromaDB, with 19 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, and guided skills. Automated institutional knowledge extraction for teams.
defaultPrompt: Search my memories for recent decisions
Mine this project into my memory palace
Show my palace status and room counts
Search for established style in the agora
See if the agora explains why this is designed this way
